project_name: Voletron Engenharia Elétrica - Solar Landing Page

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-bold uppercase tracking-tight leading-none
scale.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold uppercase tracking-tight
scale.caption: text-sm font-medium tracking-widest uppercase text-slate-500

spacing.container: container mx-auto px-4 md:px-6 lg:px-8 max-w-7xl

buttons.primary: bg-[#f5a623] hover:bg-[#d48c15] text-[#1e3a5f] font-bold text-lg px-8 py-4 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 transform hover:-translate-y-1 uppercase tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#1e3a5f] text-[#1e3a5f] hover:bg-[#1e3a5f] hover:text-white font-bold text-lg px-8 py-4 rounded-full transition-all duration-300 uppercase tracking-wide
buttons.whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] hover:bg-[#1ebe57] text-white font-bold text-lg px-8 py-4 rounded-full shadow-lg flex items-center gap-2 transition-all duration-300 transform hover:scale-105

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-slate-100 p-8 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300

inputs.default: w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-lg border border-slate-300 focus:border-[#1e3a5f] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1e3a5f]/20 outline-none transition-all

hero.description: Left: Bold Typography + Primary CTA. Right: Hero Image with geometric mask or slight overlap.
hero.background: White with subtle technical grid pattern opacity-5

bento_grid.usage: Benefits Section. Mix of large visuals and compact text blocks.

authority_section.style: Dark Navy Background (#1e3a5f). White text. High contrast.
authority_section.elements: Engineer Bio, NBR 5410 Compliance Badge, Project Stats

accessibility.contrast_check: AA required, AAA preferred for text.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-[#f5a623] for all interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Install fonts 'Barlow Condensed' and 'Manrope'. Update tailwind.config.js with the custom colors.
2. HERO: Build a high-impact hero. Headline: 'Reduza até 90% da sua Conta de Luz'. Subhead: 'Energia Solar com Engenharia de Verdade'. Primary CTA: 'Simular Economia no WhatsApp'.
3. AUTHORITY: Create a dedicated dark section (#1e3a5f bg) showcasing the Engineer's credentials (NBR 5410, 500kWp+). Use the 'engineer_working' image here.
4. PROOF: Use the 'commercial_building' and 'family_savings' images in a grid to show versatility (Residential + Commercial).
5. CTA: Use the sticky WhatsApp button approach for mobile, but also embed large CTA bands after the 'Benefits' and 'Proof' sections.
6. FOOTER: detailed footer with contact info, logo, and legal text.
7. PERFORMANCE: Use 'next/image' or optimized tags with lazy loading for all images below the fold.
8. PRESERVE: Keep the 'Voletron' logo prominent in the header.
9. AVOID: Generic 'Save the planet' messaging. Focus on 'Save Money' and 'Engineering Quality'.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky headers.
